name: herder
description: Create, interrogate, manage, and execute dependency-aware implementation plans with reviewed multi-agent integration.

interface.shortDescription: Create, refine, and execute plans with specialized agents.
interface.longDescription: Herder audits repositories, interrogates ambiguous plans one decision at a time, manages a local dependency-aware backlog, reviews candidates, rescues failures, and integrates verified work transactionally.
defaultPrompt: Create a Herder plan for this change, then grill me to refine it.
Audit this repository and create prioritized Herder plans.
Fire the implementation plans in this repository.
